segments.text: Open Tinkercad, head into the Learning Center, and start with the beginner lessons. No login, no maze, just the fast lane into 3D design, which is exactly how tutorials should behave.
segments.fallback_text: Open Tinkercad, head into the Learning Center, and start with the beginner lessons. No login, no maze, just the fast lane into 3D design, which is exactly how tutorials should behave.
segments.subtitle: Open Tinkercad, then go to the Learning Center.
segments.spoken_text: Open Tinkercad, head into the Learning Center, and start with the beginner lessons. No login, no maze, just the fast lane into 3D design, which is exactly how tutorials should behave.

segments.text: Search 3D design basics, then jump back into the 3D Design track so the CAD lessons stay front and center. We are not wandering the menu today; we are building a clean on-ramp.
segments.fallback_text: Search 3D design basics, then jump back into the 3D Design track so the CAD lessons stay front and center.
segments.subtitle: Search beginner basics, then return to the 3D Design track.
segments.spoken_text: Search 3D design basics, then jump back into the 3D Design track so the CAD lessons stay front and center.

segments.text: Open a lesson card and scroll through it. This is the quality check. We want clear visuals, actual steps, and enough detail to keep a beginner moving.
segments.fallback_text: Open a lesson card and scroll through it. We want clear visuals, actual steps, and enough detail to keep a beginner moving.
segments.subtitle: Open a lesson card and review the tutorial details.
segments.spoken_text: Open a lesson card and scroll through it. This is the quality check. We want clear visuals, actual steps, and enough detail to keep a beginner moving.

segments.text: Now jump to the gallery. Community projects are where you steal shapes, collect ideas, spot clever shortcuts, and find the spark that gets you building instead of overthinking.
segments.fallback_text: Now jump to the gallery. Community projects are where you steal shapes, collect ideas, spot clever shortcuts, and find the spark that gets you building instead of overthinking.
segments.subtitle: Open the gallery for project inspiration.
segments.spoken_text: Now jump to the gallery. Community projects are where you steal shapes, collect ideas, spot clever shortcuts, and find the spark that gets you building instead of overthinking.

segments.text: Browse the gallery for a practical idea, something like a phone stand. Inspiration beats staring at a blank canvas and pretending that counts as design research.
